description: Self-sustaining DeFi agent that earns its own operating budget from yield, pays for its own compute, trades autonomously, and provides paid financial services — without ever touching the principal.

supported_tools.name: stake_eth
supported_tools.description: Stake ETH into Lido and receive stETH

supported_tools.name: unstake_steth
supported_tools.description: Request withdrawal from stETH to ETH via Lido withdrawal queue

supported_tools.name: wrap_steth
supported_tools.description: Convert rebasing stETH to non-rebasing wstETH for DeFi use

supported_tools.name: get_balance
supported_tools.description: Query current stETH and wstETH balances and total value

supported_tools.name: get_rewards
supported_tools.description: Check accumulated staking rewards and yield estimates

supported_tools.name: get_apy
supported_tools.description: Get current Lido APY and compare with alternative yield sources

supported_tools.name: get_governance_votes
supported_tools.description: Query active Lido DAO governance proposals from Aragon and Snapshot

supported_tools.name: monitor_position
supported_tools.description: Generate plain English Lido position monitoring report

supported_tools.name: get_quote
supported_tools.description: Get swap quote from Uniswap Trading API

supported_tools.name: analyze_and_trade
supported_tools.description: Execute trade based on LLM-powered market signal analysis

supported_tools.name: get_pnl
supported_tools.description: Calculate current P&L from autonomous trading

supported_tools.name: bankr_chat
supported_tools.description: Self-funded LLM inference via Bankr API with cost-optimized model selection

supported_tools.name: self_check
supported_tools.description: Post-cycle verification of treasury, yield, budget, and vault health

supported_tools.name: check_treasury_status
supported_tools.description: Read TreasuryVault on-chain status: principal, yield, spend history

supported_tools.name: harvest_yield
supported_tools.description: Withdraw accrued yield from TreasuryVault (principal stays locked)

tech_stack.llm_gateway: Bankr API (20+ models: Claude, GPT, Gemini)
tech_stack.trading: Uniswap Trading API v1 + CoinGecko price feed

compute_constraints.model_selection: cost-optimized per task complexity (Gemini Flash for simple, Claude Sonnet for analysis, Opus for critical)
